# AI-smell meta-about-meta phrases — single source of truth.
# Checked in the FIRST N lines of an artifact (head-window) — catches documents
# that start a level above the substance.
# Consumed by tests/hooks/artifact-discipline.bats _check_meta_about_meta.
# Referenced by rules/common/output-discipline-voice.md (row 10).
#
# Pattern: the opener describes the document's own purpose or structure rather
# than engaging the subject matter. Starts meta when it should start substantive.
This document sets out to
This document aims to
This section aims to
The purpose of this section is
The purpose of this document is
The goal of this document is
The goal of this section is
This document explores
This document covers
The following document describes
